full_name: Steel, Corrosion-Resistant, Bars, Wire, Forgings, Mechanical Tubing, and Rings, 16Cr-4.0Ni-4.0Cu-0.30Cb, Solution Heat Treated, Precipitation-Hardenable (17-4 PH / UNS S17400)
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: 17-4 PH martensitic precipitation-hardening stainless steel (UNS S17400) bars, wire, forgings, mechanical tubing, and rings for aerospace parts requiring strength and corrosion resistance to about 600F (316C).

chemical_composition.note: Limiting composition of 17-4 PH as widely published by independent sources (AK Steel/Cleveland-Cliffs, MatWeb); values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties in the H900 aged condition, from independent datasheets.

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for 17-4 PH stainless is widely published by independent free sources (Cleveland-Cliffs/AK Steel, MatWeb, ASM). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 5643 designation used only as an identifier.
